title: FiniteNetherite
body:
A Small plugin that attempts to nerf the **Netherite + Mending** combo.
A good chunk of survival servers have features that make netherite way more common than it is supposed to be. This plugin aims to fight that by making mending function differently on Netherite equipment.

Instead of repairing durability, the mending item will instead cause the item to downgrade into it's diamond counterpart when it is supposed to break, forcing you to keep applying the netherite again.

There are no configuration files or permission nodes for this plugin, just drag and drop into your plugins folder.
